findings.title: Transition-evidence enforcement is opt-in when fromStatus is provided
findings.disposition: A current record cannot be evidence-checked without a source status; the standalone transition evidence assertion, fixture, model test, and RP00 validator explicitly exercise the required evidence path.

findings.title: Reference-array optional fields are validated twice
findings.disposition: The repeated validation is idempotent, fail-closed, and intentionally preserves simple composition of S07-S09 validators.

findings.title: Shared registry nextSubphase assertions moved to RP00.P01.M08.S01
findings.disposition: This follows the existing single global nextSubphase pattern and is required after S11 closes the state enum registry model slice.

findings.title: README S11 export list omitted CONTROL_PLANE_STATE_ENUM_REGISTRY_TRANSITION_EVIDENCE_KEYS
findings.disposition: The README S11 bullet now includes CONTROL_PLANE_STATE_ENUM_REGISTRY_TRANSITION_EVIDENCE_KEYS alongside the validation helper and transition evidence assertion exports.

findings.title: Evidence artifacts were absent from the reviewed diff
findings.disposition: This closeout packet now records the Claude result, command evidence, adjudication, and construction inspection under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m07-s11, with final validation rerun required before commit.

findings.title: S11 evidence artifacts must exist before production_ready
findings.disposition: Evidence artifacts are materialized in the S11 evidence root and verified by npm run rp00:control-plane:validate.

findings.title: S10 closeout must remain production_ready
findings.disposition: S10 closeout evidence exists and RP00 validation enforces it through requiredClosedSubphases.

findings.title: C00 review must record no unresolved P0/P1
findings.disposition: The actual Claude review found zero P0 and zero P1 findings.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S11 validation-helper slice with no P0/P1/P2, validation-helper-only scope compliance, no new enum values, no real data, no product-state writes, and handoff to RP00.P01.M08.S01. P3-4 was fixed in README; remaining P3/CB items are adjudicated or closed by evidence.
